title: Alumni Management Web Application
awards: Role-based portals for students, alumni, admin & super admin
excerpt: A role-based alumni platform connecting colleges with their graduates through directories, career updates, and dedicated logins.
body: Our alumni web applications give colleges and universities a single system to track graduates, share opportunities, and keep their community engaged long after graduation.
With dedicated logins for students, alumni, admin, and super admin, every user sees exactly the information relevant to them, from personal profile details to institution-wide alumni directories.

subContent.title: Built For Colleges And Their Graduates.
subContent.text: From student and alumni login portals to admin dashboards and career update sharing, the platform is designed around how colleges actually manage their alumni community, keeping records organized and graduates engaged for the long term.

title: React Development
excerpt: Fast, component-driven web applications built with React and Next.js for performance, scalability, and SEO.
body: React has become the standard for building fast, interactive web interfaces, and we use it to build applications that feel instant, scale cleanly, and stay easy to maintain as your product grows.
From single-page applications to full Next.js-powered websites, we structure every project around reusable components and clean state management.

subContent.title: Modern, Component-Driven Applications.
subContent.text: We build custom React applications, reusable component libraries, and Next.js-powered sites, with API integrations and ongoing maintenance so your application keeps performing as it scales.

title: Cloud & VPS Hosting
excerpt: Scalable cloud and VPS hosting with dedicated resources, full root access, and round-the-clock monitoring.
body: As businesses grow, shared hosting can quickly become a bottleneck. Our Cloud & VPS hosting gives you dedicated resources, full root access, and the flexibility to scale up or down as traffic changes.
Built on high-availability infrastructure with SSD storage and proactive monitoring, so applications stay fast, secure, and online.

subContent.title: Scalable Infrastructure, Managed For You.
subContent.text: From scalable cloud resources and SSD storage to snapshot backups and 24/7 security monitoring, every hosting plan is set up and managed so your applications stay online and performant.

title: Microsoft 365 Email Setup
awards: Outlook, Teams & OneDrive on your domain
excerpt: Outlook, Teams, and OneDrive configured on your business domain for a professional, secure email setup.
body: Microsoft 365 brings Outlook, Teams, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and OneDrive together in one subscription, and we handle the setup so your team gets a professional inbox on your own domain from day one.
We configure Exchange Online mailboxes, security policies, and device sync, so email, chat, and files stay connected everywhere.

subContent.title: The Full Microsoft Suite, Set Up For You.
subContent.text: From tenant setup and email migration to Teams collaboration and security policies, we configure Microsoft 365 around how your team actually works, with ongoing support as you grow.

title: Corporate Website Design
excerpt: Brand-aligned corporate websites built to communicate business credibility to clients, partners, and investors.
body: A corporate website is often the first serious impression a prospective client, partner, or investor forms of a business. We design sites that translate brand authority into a clear, confident digital experience.
From structured content for multiple departments to secure areas for reports and documentation, we build corporate platforms that scale with the organization.

subContent.title: A Digital Presence That Reflects Credibility.
subContent.text: Investor relations pages, careers microsites, and multi-department content structures are built into every corporate website, backed by secure content management that scales with the business.

title: Online Assessment Test Web Application
excerpt: Self-registration, online testing, and instant certificate generation for students, with an admin results dashboard.
body: Students register with just their name, class, place, and school, then take the assessment online without needing an admin-created account, making it easy to open the test to a wide audience.
As soon as a student completes the test, a certificate is generated automatically for them to download, while admins get a live view of completion and results.

subContent.title: From Registration To Certificate, Fully Online.
subContent.text: Quick self-registration, a distraction-free test interface, instant certificate downloads, and an admin dashboard with Excel export make the entire assessment process self-serve and easy to scale.
